3. Is not currently on sync branch
Stash is left for manual traige.
The user can pop the stash as long as:
1. They aren't ACTIVELY syncing (they should STOP instead)
2. Git & untracked file state is clean
# TODO: handle user-mangled stash edge cases. May be annoying
POPPING THE STASH STOPS THE SYNC
STASH EXISTENCE PREVENTS NEW SYNC FROM A DIRTY STATE
THE STASH CAN COEXIST WITH ALL SYNC STATES
